mapper.select:
SELECT LEVEL AS LVL , LPAD(' ', (LEVEL-1)*2) || TYPE_NAME AS TREE_NAME , TYPE_CODE , UP_TYPE_CODE , TYPE_NAME , TYPE_ORDER -- 같은 부모 내 정렬 , BROTHER_ORDER -- 형제간 추가 정렬 필요 시 사용 , TYPE_NO , TYPE_NM , STATUS , CONNECT_BY_ISLEAF AS IS_LEAF , LTRIM(SYS_CONNECT_BY_PATH(TYPE_CODE, '/'), '/') AS TYPE_PATH -- 업로드 PATH , DEPTNO FROM DATA_TYPE WHERE 1 = 1 AND STATUS = 'Y'
AND (DEPTNO = 'COM' OR DEPTNO = #{deptno})
AND DEPTNO = 'COM'
START WITH UP_TYPE_CODE IS NULL CONNECT BY PRIOR TYPE_CODE = UP_TYPE_CODE ORDER SIBLINGS BY TO_NUMBER(TYPE_ORDER)

SELECT ROWNUM AS NO , DATA_SEQ , CATE_ID , TITLE , CONTENTS , ATTACH_FILE_SEQ , VIEW_CNT , TO_CHAR(REGI_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS REGI_DATE , INWRITER_ID AS EMPNO , EMP_NAME , MAX_CNT , CEIL(MAX_CNT / #{pagePerRow}) AS TOTAL_PAGE FROM ( SELECT b.DATA_SEQ , b.CATE_ID , b.TITLE , b.CONTENTS , b.ATTACH_FILE_SEQ , b.VIEW_CNT , b.REGI_DATE , b.INWRITER_ID , e.NAME AS EMP_NAME , COUNT(*) OVER() AS MAX_CNT FROM DATA_BOARD b LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE e ON b.INWRITER_ID = e.EMPNO WHERE 1 = 1 AND b.DEL_YN = 'N'
AND b.CATE_ID = #{cateId}
AND b.REGI_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND b.REGI_DATE <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 0.99999
AND e.NAME LIKE '%' || #{empName} || '%'
AND b.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{title} || '%'
ORDER BY b.DATA_SEQ DESC ) OFFSET (#{pageNum} - 1) * #{pagePerRow} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pagePerRow} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert:
MERGE INTO PDNM.DATA_BOARD T USING ( SELECT NVL(#{dataSeq}, SEQ_DATA_BOARD.NEXTVAL) AS DATA_SEQ , #{cateId} AS CATE_ID , #{title} AS TITLE , #{contents} AS CONTENTS , #{attachFileSeq} AS ATTACH_FILE_SEQ , #{writerId} AS WRITER_ID FROM DUAL ) S ON (T.DATA_SEQ = S.DATA_SEQ)
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.CATE_ID = S.CATE_ID , T.TITLE = S.TITLE , T.CONTENTS = S.CONTENTS , T.UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE , T.UPWRITER_ID = S.WRITER_ID
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( DATA_SEQ , CATE_ID , TITLE , CONTENTS , VIEW_CNT , DEL_YN , REGI_DATE , INWRITER_ID ) VALUES ( S.DATA_SEQ , S.CATE_ID , S.TITLE , S.CONTENTS , 0 , 'N' , SYSDATE , S.WRITER_ID )
